executives.name: Carol Banducci
executives.background: Ms. Banducci was formerly the EVP and CFO of IAMGOLD Corporation. She has extensive experience in financial management and corporate strategy in the mining and manufacturing sectors.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Donald Charter
executives.background: Mr. Charter is a professional director with extensive experience in the mining industry and capital markets. He has served on numerous public company boards.
